// This is a comment line.
// This is another comment line restating what code does.
// Yet another redundant comment.
// This file is intentionally over-commented to trigger the density rule.
// We have lots of comments here to push the ratio above 30%.

// Define x as 1.
const x = 1;
// Define y as 2.
const y = 2;
// Add x and y together.
const z = x + y;
// Also add a thing.
const w = z + 1;
// More comments to imbalance ratio.
const a = w + 1;
// Keep adding comments.
const b = a + 1;
// And more comments.
const c = b + 1;
// Another comment.
const d = c + 1;
// One more comment for ratio.
const e = d + 1;
// Final comment.
const f = e + 1;

// Export everything.
export { x, y, z, w, a, b, c, d, e, f };
// Trailing comment.
// And another.
// And another.
